title: Hardened Flip Up/Down Steel Ground Wall Chain Anchor Motorbike Lock (4 Bolts) Security Locking Point for Motorcycle Bike Bicycle
features: Suitable for indoor & outdoor use;Ideal locking point for motorcycles, scooters & mopeds etc
Anchor loop folds down when not in use.Hardened steel plate with plastic cover
Countersunk fixings with ball bearings for permanent security
Includes 4 heavy duty ground bolts and 4 ball bearings

Warnning: The drawn diagram on the front of the coloured packing box should not be used directly as a template tool for drilling holes.The distance markings on it are accurate. But the size of the drawn diagram is not the same as the actual size of the anchor. Please use the drawn diagram on the instruction manual as a template tool of distance positioning for drilling holes for the anchor.
description: Product Description FD-MOTO 1.2M/1.8M STEEL Heavy Duty Anti-theft Motorbike Chain Lock Padlock Bike FD-MOTO 1.2M/1.8M φ10mm STEEL Anti-theft Motorbike Bicycle Chain Lock Padlock FD-MOTO Hardened Steel Ground Wall Anchor Motorbike Lock FD-MOTO 110dB Alarm Disc Brake Lock + Free Pouch +1.5M Cable FD-MOTO Chain Lock + Ground Wall Anchor Anti-theft Heavy Duty FD-MOTO Motorbike Chain Lock + Ground Wall Anchor Anti-theft Heavy Duty Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.6 out of 5 stars 401 4.4 out of 5 stars 296 4.5 out of 5 stars 157 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,188 4.1 out of 5 stars 384 4.2 out of 5 stars 19 Price — no data — no data £15.95 £ 15 . 95 £15.99 £ 15 . 99 — no data — no data Category CL729 Chain Lock CL721 Chain Lock Anchor Alarm Disc Lock Chain Lock+Anchor Chain Lock+Anchor Size 1.2M/1.8M 1.2M/1.8M 2 bolts 110dB 7mm Pin 1.2M/1.8M 1.2M/1.8M Suitable for indoor & outdoor use;Ideal locking point for motorcycles, scooters & mopeds etc FEATURES Anchor loop folds down when not in use Hardened steel plate with plastic cover Countersunk fixings with ball bearings for permanent security Includes 4 heavy duty ground bolts,4 ball bearings and allen key Suitable for indoor & outdoor use;Ideal locking point for motorcycles, scooters & mopeds etc
